title: Minky 6L Caddy, Sturdy Carry Handle, Easy To Wipe Clean, Multipurpose Storage Caddy With Internal Removable Bag Retention Ring, Large 6-Litre Capacity, Made In The UK
features: LARGE CAPACITY - With its large 6-litre capacity, this caddy is designed to hold just about anything you need to keep organized. From household essentials to craft supplies, it's got you covered.
BAG RETENTION RING - With its bag retention ring and stay open lid, this caddy is perfect for storing food waste without any hassle. Say hello to a cleaner and more hygienic environment.
STYLISH & STURDY - Designed with sturdy carry handle that provides a comfortable grip and an easy to wipe clean surface, this caddy is perfect for anyone who values both functionality and style.
VERSATILE USE - This versatile storage solution is perfect for keeping your essentials in one place. Whether it's DIY supplies, first aid supplies or beauty products, this caddy can handle it all.
MADE IN THE UK – Made with precision and expertise, our products are both: quality & durability. With a rich heritage and unrivalled experience in manufacturing, we are the trusted choice since 1941.
description: Product Description Minky 6L Caddy - White Keep your home neat and clutter-free with the Minky 6L Caddy. This versatile organizer keeps your belongings tidy and easily accessible. Convenient Design Featuring a sturdy carry handle, it offers a comfortable grip for effortless transportation. The easy-to-clean surface ensures that spills and messes can be wiped away in seconds, saving you time and effort. Clean & Organised Kitchen Designed with a bag retention ring, it securely holds your waste bag in place, preventing any spills or leaks. The stay open lid makes it easy to dispose of your food waste without any hassle. See More
